meaning: adj.罗马教皇的,主教的,大祭司的n.主教祭服及徽章,主教仪典书
examples: President of the Pontifical Council for the Family.
Pontifical aides hope the event may mark a turning point.
This is unusual for a Church that boasts its own Pontifical Academy of Sciences.
It will be held at the Pontifical Catholic University (PUC-Rio), in Rio de Janeiro, Brazil.
